introSection: Factory Coaster is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Wuxi Sunac Land in Binhu, Wuxi, Jiangsu, China. It opened on 25 August 2019.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders per train.

fullText:
Factory Coaster is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Wuxi Sunac Land in Binhu, Wuxi, Jiangsu, China. It opened on 25 August 2019.



2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 16 riders per train.
